personalContext.summary: Bilingual individual (Chinese/English) focused on systematic algorithmic skill development through disciplined LeetCode practice.

topOfMind.summary: Maintains rigorous daily LeetCode study routine with structured Markdown documentation; on 2026-04-22 completed Daily Challenge #2452 Words Within Two Edits of Dictionary (Medium, Trie/Array/String topics), continuing streak from previous days. On 2026-04-21 completed 27 unique problems from 22+ submissions (Python3, 100% acceptance rate), including Minimize Hamming Distance After Swap Operations, Exchange Elements Max Alternating Sum, Smallest String With Swaps, Set Matrix Zeroes, Product of Array Except Self, Merge Intervals, Maximum Subarray, Longest Continuous Subarray with Absolute Diff ≤ Limit, Sliding Window Maximum, Count Special Integers, Two Furthest Houses With Different Colors, Multi Source Flood Fill, Smallest Stable Index II/I, Max Distance Between Index Pairs, Subarray Sum Equals K, Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters, Mirror Distance of an Integer, Trapping Rain Water, 3Sum, Container With Most Water, Move Zeroes, Longest Consecutive Sequence, Word Break, Minimum Absolute Distance Between Pairs, Binary Tree Max Path Sum, Binary Tree Diameter, Course Schedule II. Successfully solved all problems with no failures. Actively practices diverse algorithmic techniques including Dynamic Programming, BFS, Two Pointers, Hash Tables, Prefix Sums, DFS, Tree traversal, Topological Sort, Backtracking, Greedy algorithms, Monotonic Stack, Sliding Window, Bit manipulation, Graph algorithms. Documents progress via comprehensive Markdown summaries stored locally in /mnt/user-data/outputs/ directory with automatic filename convention leetcode_daily_summary_YYYYMMDD.md.

recentMonths.summary: Engaged in consistent daily LeetCode practice with documented study sessions spanning multiple algorithm categories. On 2026-04-22, completed Daily Challenge #2452 Words Within Two Edits of Dictionary (Medium difficulty, Trie/Array/String topics, associated with Google/Facebook/Bloomberg). On 2026-04-21, expanded practice significantly with 27 unique problems solved including advanced topics like graph algorithms, tree traversals, bit manipulation, sliding window optimization, and dynamic programming variations. On 2026-04-19, achieved 10 unique problems from 18 submissions with difficulty distribution Easy×1, Medium×8, Hard×1, including Multi Source Flood Fill (#101045), Smallest Stable Index I & II (#101046, #101047), Maximum Distance Between a Pair of Values (#1855) Daily Challenge, Subarray Sum Equals K (#560), Mirror Distance of an Integer (#3783), Trapping Rain Water (#42), 3Sum (#15), Container With Most Water (#11), Moving Zeroes (Easy), and others. Encountered tool failure with leetcode_get_recent_ac_submissions returning empty results on 2026-04-19, resolved by switching to leetcode_get_all_submissions tool to retrieve complete submission data. Generates comprehensive Markdown summaries with problem links, complexity tables, technique analysis, and performance metrics. Maintains GitHub integration preference but prioritizes local storage reliability through outputs directory fallback mechanism. Uses Python3 exclusively for LeetCode solutions.

longTermBackground.summary: Demonstrates strong interest in algorithmic problem-solving and systematic skill development. Shows disciplined approach to technical learning with documentation and version control practices.
